Study 2: CMU Research Agreement.summary: Research agreement with Chiang Mai University for screening chemicals against Sitophilus zeamais, Tribolium sp., and Suidasia pontifica under the October 20, 2025 agreement and Statement of Work 1 performance period.

tasks.desc: Agreement execution and initial 50% payment release
Ship 8 proprietary materials to Chiang Mai University
Conduct bioassay research program at CMU facilities
Complete project work and trigger 25% completion payment
Submit final report with raw data, statistics, and summary tables

Kemin Batch 2.summary: Batch 2 is still in delivery buildout, with field preparation active and downstream quality work scheduled across May.

Kemin Special Project.summary: The special project is focused on contract validation and final reporting, with a smaller task set but tighter executive visibility.
